# Task State Update Checklist

## Before Starting

- [ ] Read `docs/CURRENT_TASK.md`.
- [ ] Read `docs/NEXT_TASK.md`.
- [ ] Read `docs/CURRENT_THINKING.md`.
- [ ] Read the relevant Sprint packet or work package.
- [ ] Read the relevant QA spec and test IDs.
- [ ] Confirm owned and forbidden files.
- [ ] Run current guardrail commands if changing code or process.

## While Working

- [ ] Keep edits scoped to the task.
- [ ] Add/update tests with requirement IDs.
- [ ] Add privacy/security notes for risky behavior.
- [ ] Record blockers immediately in `docs/NEXT_TASK.md` or `docs/TECH_DEBT.md`.
- [ ] Keep source files near 200-300 lines where practical.

## Before Final Response

- [ ] Run relevant commands.
- [ ] Update `docs/CURRENT_TASK.md`.
- [ ] Update `docs/NEXT_TASK.md`.
- [ ] Update `docs/CURRENT_THINKING.md`.
- [ ] Update `docs/TASK_LOG.md`.
- [ ] Update backlog/risk/debt docs if anything changed.
- [ ] Update `docs/conversation-archive/` for direction/process decisions.
- [ ] Confirm `git status --short`.
- [ ] Commit in short semantic bursts if requested or appropriate.

## Final Response Evidence

- Changed files:
- Commands run:
- Tests skipped:
- Current branch/commit:
- Next exact task:
